channel.title: GitHub Objective-C Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Objective-C in GitHub

item.title: realm/realm-swift
item.description: Realm is a mobile database: a replacement for Core Data & SQLite

item.title: Hammerspoon/hammerspoon
item.description: Staggeringly powerful macOS desktop automation with Lua

item.title: PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher_iOS
item.description: A Minecraft: Java Edition Launcher for Android and iOS based on Boardwalk. This repository contains source code for iOS/iPadOS platform.

item.title: mixpanel/mixpanel-iphone
item.description: Official iOS (Objective-C) Tracking Library for Mixpanel Analytics

item.title: opa334/TrollStore
item.description: Jailed iOS app that can install IPAs permanently with arbitary entitlements and root helpers because it trolls Apple

item.title: rentzsch/jrswizzle
item.description: one-stop-shop for all your method swizzling needs

item.title: HeshamMegid/HMSegmentedControl
item.description: A highly customizable drop-in replacement for UISegmentedControl.

item.title: FLEXTool/FLEX
item.description: An in-app debugging and exploration tool for iOS

item.title: specta/specta
item.description: A light-weight TDD / BDD framework for Objective-C & Cocoa

item.title: iziz/libPhoneNumber-iOS
item.description: iOS port from libphonenumber (Google's phone number handling library)
